{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dreadgod cults headquarters
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dreadgod cults]] have a mobile headquarters.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
